message.content: <local-command-caveat>Caveat: The messages below were generated by the user while running local commands. DO NOT respond to these messages or otherwise consider them in your response unless the user explicitly asks you to.</local-command-caveat>

@client\src\components\HomePage\Canvas\CanvasEditor.jsx You are a World-class UI/UX Designer and Lead Frontend Engineer. We are rebuilding the "Iskrib Canvas Editor" to feel like a high-end, immersive creative atelier.The Core Philosophy: The interface should be "Invisible." It must feel like a physical desk where creativity flows without technical friction.UI/UX Transformation (CSS Modules + Konva):Tactile Background Engine:Don't use a flat color. Implement a "Multi-Surface" background. Use a subtle grain/paper texture with an infinite grid that fades in/out based on zoom level.Add a dynamic "Ambient Shadow" that follows the mouse/touch, making the canvas feel like a physical object under a light source.Contextual Glassmorphism UI:The Floating Dock: Use a frosted-glass bottom dock (backdrop-filter: blur(15px)) for primary tools.The Pie Menu: Instead of static sidebars, implement a "Long-press/Right-click Pie Menu" at the cursor's location for quick actions (Color, Font, Duplicate). This keeps the user's eyes on their work.Pro-Mobile Interaction:Use Konva multi-touch events for Pinch-to-Zoom and Two-Finger Pan.Implement "Gesture Shortcuts": Two-finger tap to Undo, three-finger tap to Redo (Procreate style).Motion Design & Micro-Interactions:The "Lift" Effect: When an object is dragged, it should scale up 5% and its shadow should soften/grow, simulating it being lifted off the paper.Spring Physics: Use konva tweens or framer-motion for "snapping" elements. If I delete a sticker, it shouldn't just vanish; it should "poof" or "crumple" away.High-Fidelity Tooling:Hand-Drawn Smoothing: Implement a "Tension" algorithm in the drawing logic so freehand lines are smoothed into beautiful, professional curves in real-time.Smart-Stamps: When a user drops a stamp, give it a random $\pm 5^\circ$ rotation and a slight "offset" so it looks hand-placed, not machine-perfect.Multi-Layer Performance:Architect the Konva.Stage with at least 3 layers: GridLayer (Static), DrawingLayer (Interactive), and UILayer (Cursors & Selection boxes) to ensure 60FPS performance on mobile.Technical Requirement: Provide the CSS Modules and React code. Ensure Supabase Real-time updates only the specific changed node to maintain speed.
